description: 五大功能改进：云端API多风格支持、常用片段快捷操作、深色模式边框修复、跨平台审查修复、多主题支持

userStories.title: Add API style config field (chat/completions/responses/messages)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a config field to select which API request/response format the cloud provider uses.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `api_style` field to AiConfig enum: ChatCompletions | Completions | Responses | Messages
Default to ChatCompletions for OpenAI provider, Messages for Anthropic provider
Add `anthropic_endpoint` String field to AiConfig, default empty (empty = use api.anthropic.com)
AiConfig JSON roundtrip includes api_style and anthropic_endpoint
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added ApiStyle enum with 4 variants, anthropic_endpoint field, defaults and serde support in config.rs

userStories.title: Implement OpenAI Completions API format in cloud.rs
userStories.description: As a user, I want to use providers that only support the legacy /v1/completions endpoint.
acceptanceCriteria: Add completions-style request builder: sends prompt (not messages) to {endpoint}/completions
Parse response from choices[0].text (not choices[0].message.content)
OpenAiProvider::infer dispatches based on api_style config
Retain existing chat/completions behavior unchanged
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: Added infer_completions() with prompt/text parsing, dispatches by api_style

userStories.title: Implement OpenAI Responses API format in cloud.rs
userStories.description: As a user, I want to use the newer OpenAI Responses API (/v1/responses).
acceptanceCriteria: Add responses-style request builder: sends input (not messages) to {endpoint}/responses
Parse response from output[0].content[0].text
OpenAiProvider::infer handles all three styles: chat/completions, completions, responses
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: Added infer_responses() with input/output parsing, all 3 styles dispatch in infer()

userStories.title: Add Anthropic custom endpoint support
userStories.description: As a user, I want to point Anthropic at a custom URL (proxy, Bedrock, Vertex).
acceptanceCriteria: AnthropicProvider struct stores an `endpoint` field read from config
If anthropic_endpoint is empty, default to https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages
AnthropicProvider::infer uses the configured endpoint URL
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: AnthropicProvider stores endpoint, defaults to api.anthropic.com/v1/messages when empty

userStories.title: Add API style and Anthropic endpoint to Settings UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to select API style and set custom Anthropic URL in Settings.
acceptanceCriteria: Add API style dropdown in cloud settings: Chat Completions / Completions / Responses (for OpenAI), Messages (for Anthropic)
Add Anthropic endpoint URL input field (shown when Anthropic is selected)
handleSave includes api_style and anthropic_endpoint
Config load reads api_style and anthropic_endpoint
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: SettingsPanel has API style dropdown and Anthropic endpoint input, handleSave/config load include new fields

userStories.title: Add snippet paste-to-active and touch_snippet integration
userStories.description: As a user, I want clicking a snippet to immediately paste it into the active app, and see MRU ordering work.
acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar copySnippetContent calls invoke('paste_to_active', { content }) instead of navigator.clipboard.writeText
After clicking a snippet, call invoke('touch_snippet', { id }) to update last_used
List refreshes after touch to reflect new MRU order
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Sidebar uses paste_to_active and touch_snippet for instant paste + MRU ordering

userStories.title: Add snippet section to floating popup
userStories.description: As a user, I want to access my snippets from the quick-access floating popup.
acceptanceCriteria: FloatingPopup loads snippets via invoke('list_snippets') on mount
Add a collapsible 'Snippets' section below the recent items in the popup
Each snippet shows title, clicking pastes via paste_to_active and calls touch_snippet
Snippets are searchable via the existing search bar (filter by title)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: FloatingPopup loads snippets on mount, collapsible Snippets section below recent items, filtered by search, paste via paste_to_active + touch_snippet

userStories.title: Fix dark mode borders — border-white/80 and inline styles
userStories.description: As a user, I want no bright white borders visible in dark mode.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace all `border-white/80` without dark variant with `border-white/80 dark:border-white/10` across SettingsPanel, AiResultPopup, FloatingPopup, ConfirmDialog
Replace all `border-white/60` without dark variant with `border-white/60 dark:border-white/10`
Fix ContentArea inline border styles (lines ~228, ~265) to use CSS classes with dark: variant
Fix SettingsPanel inline border styles (lines ~342, ~347, ~835) to use CSS classes
Fix `border-gray-300/50` in FloatingPopup (3 occurrences) with dark: variant
Fix `border-red-200/60`, `border-blue-200`, `border-green-200/60` in SettingsPanel/AiResultPopup with dark: variants
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Fixed 40+ border instances: border-white/80, border-white/60, inline styles, border-gray-300/50, border-red/blue/green variants

userStories.title: Add Linux screen recording via ffmpeg x11grab
userStories.description: As a Linux user, I want screen recording to work instead of showing 'Not Supported'.
acceptanceCriteria: Linux start_screen_recording uses `ffmpeg -f x11grab -i :0.0` to record to temp .mp4
Linux stop_recording sends SIGINT to ffmpeg process (same pattern as macOS)
Show 'install ffmpeg' dialog if ffmpeg is not found
Linux tray menu no longer shows 'Not Supported' for recording — shows same label as other platforms
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Linux uses ffmpeg -f x11grab for recording, SIGINT to stop, shows install dialog if missing

userStories.title: Improve Linux screenshot to support area selection
userStories.description: As a Linux user, I want to select a screen area for screenshots instead of always capturing full screen.
acceptanceCriteria: Linux screenshot tries `gnome-screenshot -a` first for interactive area selection
Falls back to full-screen capture if -a flag fails or tool is missing
Existing macOS and Windows screenshot behavior unchanged
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added gnome-screenshot -a as first attempt, falls back to full-screen capture

userStories.title: Add xdotool missing dependency error message on Linux
userStories.description: As a Linux user, I want to see an error message if xdotool is not installed instead of silent paste failure.
acceptanceCriteria: Linux simulate_paste checks if xdotool exists before running it
Returns Err with message 'xdotool not installed' if binary not found
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: simulate_paste checks which xdotool before running, returns Err with install instruction

userStories.title: Extend theme system with accent color support
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the theme infrastructure to support multiple accent colors beyond blue.
acceptanceCriteria: Add AccentColor type to theme.ts: 'blue' | 'green' | 'purple' | 'orange' | 'rose'
Add accentColor signal and setAccentColor function
Persist accent color to localStorage key 'aboard-accent'
Set data-accent attribute on documentElement when accent changes
Add CSS custom property sets in design-tokens.css for each accent color under :root[data-accent='green'] etc.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: Added AccentColor type, signal, localStorage persistence, data-accent attribute, CSS vars for 5 colors

userStories.title: Migrate hardcoded blue classes to accent CSS variables
userStories.description: As a developer, I need all hardcoded blue accent colors replaced with CSS variable references so theme switching works.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace bg-blue-500/bg-blue-600 active button classes with custom utility using var(--color-accent)
Replace ring-blue-500 focus ring classes with var(--color-accent) equivalent
Fix inline hex color in SettingsPanel line ~312 to use var(--color-accent)
Fix hardcoded rgba in index.css .ai-banner to use var(--color-accent)
All themes (blue/green/purple/orange/rose) produce correct accent colors when selected
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add accent color picker to Settings Appearance tab
userStories.description: As a user, I want to pick my preferred accent color in Settings.
acceptanceCriteria: Appearance tab shows 5 color swatches: blue, green, purple, orange, rose
Active swatch is highlighted with a check or ring
Clicking a swatch immediately applies the accent color
Selection persists across restarts
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add i18n keys for all new UI elements
userStories.description: As a user, I want all new UI elements to have both Chinese and English labels.
acceptanceCriteria: Add keys: settings.apiStyle, settings.apiStyleChat, settings.apiStyleCompletions, settings.apiStyleResponses, settings.apiStyleMessages, settings.anthropicEndpoint, sidebar.snippetsSection, settings.accentColor
Both zh and en translations present for all keys
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added 8 new i18n keys with zh/en translations for API style, Anthropic endpoint, accent color
